patch.value: GH-606: concurrent note/tag appends hard-conflict the .toon item file; stale count headers corrupt the item beyond parsing

Commutative appends (notes/tags/tests) to the same item on two branches merge cleanly via a .toon-aware merge driver or count-header-free serialization; a naive hand-resolution with wrong count headers is detected by validate as a hard failure, not silently skipped; repro from GH-606 becomes a regression test

author: maintainer-agent
message: repair placeholder dep with real GH-599 item id

patch.value: GH-606. .toon item files use count-prefixed array headers (notes[N]{...}, tags[N], tests[N]); concurrent commutative appends hard-conflict, and hand-resolution with a stale count makes the item unreadable by pm get while validate skips it silently (pm-cxyv). Authoritative-state twin of pm-wc1r (history layer). Fix direction: .toon-aware merge driver or count-header-free serialization; at minimum validate must hard-fail on header/data disagreement.
